sample_desc: Thirty-one pulmonary tuberculosis patients, ranging in age from 23 to 67 years, average age is 40.7, were enrolled from Shanghai Pneumonia Hospital. Sputum samples were collected once patients were admission to the hospital, part of sputum were used to do some medical tests, the remaining sputum used for extracting DNA. And other medical tests like image diagnoses have been done to confirm they are pulmonary tuberculosis. The patients had not taken antibiotics before sampling.
